tagline: Your One-Stop Shop for Commercial and Residential Landscaping

hero.headline: 23 Years Transforming Phoenix Properties
hero.subheadline: Your property deserves more than a crew that shows up and disappears. Greenscapes Landcare has spent over two decades building lasting relationships with property managers and homeowners across the Valley. From landscape design to pool construction to smart irrigation, one call handles it all.
checkmarks: One company for every outdoor need

services.label: What We Do
services.headline: Every Outdoor Service Your<br class="hidden md:block"> Property Needs, One Team
services.subtitle: Stop juggling multiple contractors for your landscape, trees, pool, and irrigation. Greenscapes and our sister companies handle everything under one roof so your property looks its best year-round.

cards.title: Landscape Design & Installation
cards.description: Full-service design and build including hardscapes, pavers, BBQs, fire pits, water features, artificial turf, colorscaping, and landscape lighting tailored to the Arizona climate.

cards.title: Commercial Property Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive turf, shrub, and tree care plus fertilization, weed control, pest management, and irrigation repair for apartment complexes and multi-housing communities.

cards.title: Pool Design & Construction
cards.description: Custom swimming pool design, construction, and repair through our sister company Pool Hub, LLC. From backyard retreats to commercial amenities, we build it right.

cards.title: Smart Irrigation Systems
cards.description: Weathermatic-certified smart irrigation delivering an average 38% water savings. Full installation, analysis, maintenance, and EPA WaterSense certified technology.

cards.title: Professional Tree Service
cards.description: Commercial and residential tree removals, trimming, and fertilization through our sister company Turning Leaf, LLC, staffed by experienced certified arborists.

cards.title: Hardscape & Outdoor Living
cards.description: Pavers, retaining walls, outdoor kitchens, fireplaces, block work, stucco, and custom mailboxes. We turn your outdoor space into an extension of your home.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Beautiful Property

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Consultation
steps.description: Tell us about your property goals. We will walk the site, listen to your vision, and deliver a detailed proposal within 48 hours. No pressure, no obligations.

steps.title: Our Expert Crews Get to Work
steps.description: Licensed, insured professionals handle every phase of your project. We keep you informed with regular updates and never leave a job until you are completely satisfied.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Transformed Property
steps.description: Your property stays immaculate with ongoing maintenance or you love your finished project for years to come. If anything falls short, we come back and make it right.

about.label: Why Property Owners Trust Greenscapes
about.headline: One Family-Owned Company, Every Outdoor Service You Need
about.description: Since 2003, Greenscapes Landcare has grown from a small family operation into a full-service landscape powerhouse serving the Phoenix metro area. With sister companies Turning Leaf (tree service) and Pool Hub (pool construction), we eliminated the headache of coordinating multiple contractors. Owner Frank and his team specialize in apartment complexes and multi-housing communities, building long-term relationships that span over a decade with many of our property managers.

features.title: True One-Stop Shop
features.description: Landscape, trees, pools, and irrigation all handled by one company and its sister brands. One point of contact, one team you trust.

features.title: Weathermatic Smart Irrigation Partner
features.description: Our EPA WaterSense certified smart irrigation systems save an average of 38% on water bills while keeping landscapes thriving in the Arizona heat.

features.title: 23 Years of Proven Results
features.description: Property managers have trusted us for over a decade because we show up, communicate, and deliver results that protect property values.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service package that fits your property. Custom commercial contracts available for multi-housing communities.

guarantee.headline: Our "Property Perfect" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit or completed project, we will return and make it right at no additional charge. No fine print, no runaround. Over two decades of repeat clients and an A+ BBB rating prove that Greenscapes stands behind every job we take on.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start a new project?
faqs.answer: Most consultations are scheduled within a few days. For ongoing maintenance, we can typically begin within one to two weeks. Emergency tree work and urgent irrigation repairs get priority scheduling — just call and we will work with your timeline.

faqs.question: Do you work with apartment complexes and HOAs?
faqs.answer: Absolutely — multi-housing communities are our specialty. We maintain apartment complexes, HOAs, and commercial properties across the entire Phoenix metro area with customized maintenance programs tailored to each property.

faqs.question: What makes your irrigation systems different?
faqs.answer: We are a Weathermatic Premier Partner using EPA WaterSense certified smart controllers. Our systems deliver an average 38% water savings compared to traditional timers, which means lower water bills and healthier landscapes year-round.

faqs.question: Can you really handle landscaping, pools, and tree work?
faqs.answer: Yes. Greenscapes Landcare handles landscape design, installation, and maintenance. Our sister company Pool Hub handles pool design and construction. Turning Leaf handles tree services. One phone call covers all three.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. Greenscapes Landcare is fully licensed, bonded, and insured in the state of Arizona. We have maintained a BBB A+ rating since 2011 and are proud members of the Arizona Multihousing Association.

testimonials.name: Long-term Manager
testimonials.text: I have been using Greenscapes at my communities for over 12 years and happy with their landscaping services. They are consistent, responsive, and I highly recommend them for any commercial property.

testimonials.name: Frank's Backyard Client
testimonials.text: Frank and his team transformed our backyard beyond what we imagined. They were always on time, kept us informed throughout the entire process, and the end result was absolutely stunning. I recommend Greenscapes to everyone.

testimonials.name: Recent Project Owner
testimonials.text: Incredibly skilled, professional, and truly masters of their craft. The workmanship was outstanding with incredible attention to detail. Frank had great ideas and his team executed them perfectly.
